paper.title: OpenAI Five Benchmark: Results
paper.abstract: Yesterday, OpenAI Five won a best-of-three against a team of 99.95th percentile Dota players: Blitz, Cap, Fogged, Merlini, and MoonMeander—four of whom have played Dota professionally—in front of a live audience and 100,000 concurrent livestream viewers.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
